title: 16Pack Artificial Poinsettia Bushes,25cm Christmas Flowers Faux Red Velvet Poinsettia Floral for Indoor Outdoor Christmas Tree Ornament Home Porch Decorations

description: Features: High Quality Material: The red Poinsettias flowers are made of premium velvet silk fabric, durable and reusable,no deform,no odor, no fade and no need maintenance, great for christmas decorations. Package Includes: 16 x Christmas Flowers with one pot
